item.title: The greatest country on earth
item.description: THE contradiction was perhaps most visible in the lives of American women. For generations, married women existed under the doctrine of coverture, whereby their legal identity was effectively absorbed into that of their husbands. They could neither vote nor enjoy equal property rights, while higher education, public office, and many professions remained largely......GeographicReference

item.description: FIFA has reiterated that LGBTQ rainbow flags will be allowed inside Seattle's Lumen Field on Friday when the stadium hosts Iran and Egypt's World Cup G game, despite objections from both nation's football federations....

item.title: Advocaat 'proud' of Curacao as minnows exit World Cup
item.description: Curacao coach Dick Advocaat said Thursday his team could go out of the World Cup with their heads held high as the veteran Dutchman did not rule out remaining in charge of the Caribbean minnows....

item.title: Cybersecurity, digital trust must be national priorities: state minister
item.description: Information and broadcasting affairs state minister Yaser Khan Chowdhury on Friday called for making cybersecurity and digital trust top national priorities to ensure that the country's rapid digital transformation is secure, resilient, and sustainable.......

item.title: Tunisia boss Renard has 'no regrets' despite World Cup flop
item.description: Herve Renard said Thursday he had no regrets about taking on the job as Tunisia's emergency coach at the World Cup despite the North African nation's catastrophic campaign....
